subcodes.first_line: O thou whose insight hath been illumined by the light of guidance! Through the bounties of Supreme Guidance, the garden of that heavenly beloved's heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجلت بصیرته بنور الهدی از فیض هدایت کبری حدیقه قلب آن حبیب رحمانی رشک
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant
